steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student needs to identify which growing season had the lowest walnut price according to the graph. The answer must name the season whose walnut bar is shortest.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '2017/18 season': the walnut bar for this season is taller than 2018/19, indicating a higher price. ✗
  • Choice B — '2018/19 season': the walnut bar for this season is the shortest of all four, indicating the lowest price. ✓
  • Choice C — '2019/20 season': the bar for 2019/20 is taller than 2018/19. ✗
  • Choice D — '2016/17 season': the bar for 2016/17 is taller than 2018/19. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
